intro: Neoregelia ibitipocensis, commonly known as the Ibitipoca Bromeliad, is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the bromeliad family, characterized by its vibrant flowers and water-holding leaves. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Neoregelia ibitipocensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
